name: clone-n-write
description: Clone a real person's writing process, structure, and measurable style with deterministic coaching gates.

interface.shortDescription: Clone a person's writing process and coach measurable style
interface.longDescription: Build a private exemplar registry, draft from genre-specific structural anchors, and verify style and structure with deterministic Python gates.
defaultPrompt: Set up a dummy persona and walk me through the clone-n-write onboarding flow.
Build an outline from a dummy exemplar registry without using private persona data.
